problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Carbon. Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
